arts.ttl: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta vows to keep Liverpool waiting for title
arts.sum: Liverpool will claim the title with five matches remaining if Arsenal lose against Ipswich at Portman Road and they see off Leicester on Sunday.

arts.ttl: CONFIRMED: Huge Liverpool star leaves Anfield as ‘irreversible’ decision made
arts.sum: Liverpool may have seen Mo Salah and Virgil van Dijk commit their futures to the club, but it still promises to be busy summer of transfers for Arne Slot’s side, with one major star now confirmed to be departing Anfield. Liverpool trying to limit Darwin Nunez damage

arts.ttl: Nunez and Liverpool both open to summer transfer exit
arts.sum: Darwin Nunez is expected to leave Liverpool this summer with both club and player open to an exit. Nunez has struggled to nail down a regular role this season with the 25-year-old having started just eight Premier League games. The Uruguay international has failed to live up to expectations since his arrival from Benfica for […] The post Nunez and Liverpool both open to summer transfer exit first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: New €100m price tag: Liverpool & Arsenal transfer target still “likely” to move this summer
arts.sum: Liverpool and Arsenal may reportedly now have to pay even more for the potential transfer of Eintracht Frankfurt striker Hugo Ekitike. The talented Frenchman has been in prolific form this season, scoring 21 goals in all competitions so far, and is expected to seal a move to a bigger club this summer. arts.ttl: 25 G/A “gifted” star has received transfer offer from Liverpool
arts.sum: Liverpool may reportedly be in for an exciting transfer this summer that would possibly also spell very bad news for rivals Arsenal. arts.ttl: Rio Ngumoha sends reminder to Arne Slot as Liverpool set up daunting Man City test
arts.sum: Rio Ngumoha scored his first goals for Liverpool Under-21s as they drew 2-2 with Aston Villa on Friday night

arts.ttl: Liverpool title win would be 'so special' - Bradley
arts.sum: Conor Bradley says it would be a "dream come true" to help Liverpool clinch the Premier League title this season.

arts.ttl: Liverpool boss Arne Slot not thinking about Premier League title this weekend
arts.sum: If Arsenal were to lose at Ipswich on Sunday the Reds could clinch a record-equalling 20th championship with victory at Leicester later in the day.

arts.ttl: Unsettled Liverpool star “expected to leave” this summer, reporter confirms
arts.sum: Liverpool are expected to make significant squad alterations this summer, and one of these will be in the striker position. Big-money number nine Darwin Nunez has struggled since his arrival from Benfica three years ago, and now will be the time that he brings his Anfield stay to a close.
